_doc: jlens PolicyEngine v0 — ADVISORY / SHADOW config. Prototype thresholds ONLY (from the M5 smoke heads); these are NOT production values. Final/production thresholds stay gold/audit gated. The engine recommends + logs; it NEVER blocks or executes.
_scored_labels_doc: The only two labels with M5 end-to-end coverage. All other risk labels are unscored in v0 (null = unknown, never assumed safe).

risk_score._doc: The engine's overall risk score per prompt = the probability of the RISKIEST scored condition. For answerable_from_memory the RISK direction is FALSE (not answerable from memory -> needs grounding), so its risk contribution = 1 - p(answerable). For unsupported_or_hallucinated the risk direction is TRUE, so its contribution = p(unsupported). Overall risk = max of the two contributions.

levels._doc: Score bands on the overall risk score in [0,1]. Lower bound inclusive, upper exclusive; 'critical' catches the top. PROTOTYPE bands — tune on gold-audited data before any production use.

level_action_map._doc: Recommended v0 action per level. Advisory only. Actions: answer_locally (respond from the model directly), verify (self-check / second pass), retrieve (pull grounding/RAG), run_checker (math/code/tool verification), ask_user (clarify), require_confirmation (get human sign-off before an autonomous action).

gating._doc: v0 is shadow/advisory. It does NOT gate real actions. Final/production thresholds and any real gating require gold/audit-tier labels (see LABELING_HANDOFF.md) — NOT these prototype bands.
